rotation.task: Submit the newest Medium draft to one publication (Better Programming/UX Collective-style targets list in eb1a/evidence-tracker.md)
Log this month's Topmate mentorship sessions (count + topics) into the judging evidence log
Update mission-control/eb1a/evidence-tracker.md — one row per new artifact this month
Find one conference CFP in identity/adtech/data (MAU, Programmatic IO, PyData) and draft a 3-line abstract
Pitch one journalist/newsletter (AdExchanger, MarTech.org, Import AI-style) with the synthetic-population demo
Check PyPI downloads milestone for identity-resolution-engine; screenshot + log if a round number passed
Ask one senior colleague/mentee for a dated LinkedIn recommendation referencing specific work
File APAN ARG Vice Chair progress note (role = leading/critical role criterion)
